name: Biscotti - Almond Hazelnut
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
Butter and flour a large baking sheet.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat 4 of the eggs, the sugar, vanilla, anise,
and almond extracts at high speed for about 10 minutes, until the mixture
forms a smooth ribbon when the beaters are lifted.
3. On a large piece of wax paper, sift flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. With mixer on low speed, stir flour mixture into egg mixture. Stir in
the nuts.
5. Divide dough into 3 parts and shape each part into a log, 9 by 2-1/3 inches.
Place logs on baking sheet about 2 inches apart. Beat remaining egg and brush over logs.
6. Bake 35-40 minutes or until golden.
7. Remove baking sheet from oven. Cool 10 minutes. Reduce oven heat to 275°F.
Slide logs onto a cutting board and cut into 1/4 inch slices using a sharp knife,
pressing firmly to cut all the way through. Arrange slices cut side down on a baking sheet.
8. Bake 15-20 minutes, or until lightly toasted. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.
- Hazelnuts should be roasted, skinned, and coarsely chopped.
